name: orbit
description: Autonomous loop runner for nexus-autoloop. Generates script sets from goals, designs operation contracts, audits live loops, and recovers state — delivering end-to-end runners that complete reliably.

capabilities.summary: Generate ready-to-run nexus-autoloop script sets from goal input
Build measurable loop contracts with ACs, footer semantics, and resumable state
Classify and verify live loop status with evidence-backed assessment
Map findings to failure taxonomy with severity and recovery actions
Recover from state drift, corrupted evidence, or inconsistent loop artifacts
Pre-failure health assessment and risk reporting
Evidence-based parameter adaptation with LES scoring and safety guardrails
Detect semantically stuck loops via action similarity, oscillation pattern, and output delta analysis

recipes.label: Generate Loop
recipes.when: Generate a new nexus-autoloop script set from a goal

recipes.label: Loop Contract
recipes.when: goal.md, ACs, footer semantics design, weak contract hardening

recipes.label: Loop Audit
recipes.when: Status classification and evidence verification of live loops

recipes.label: State Recovery
recipes.when: Recovery from state.env drift, footer mismatch, or corrupted loop artifacts

recipes.label: Ralph Loop
recipes.when: Generate or audit a Huntley-style Ralph Loop runner (immutable `PROMPT.md`, plan/build two-mode, filesystem-as-memory, `<promise>COMPLETE</promise>` terminator). Green-field only.
